title: Aneesh Gupte leaves Desai & Diwanji to join SAM as Partner
description: Desai & Diwanji Parter Aneesh Gupte has joined Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co.Gupte is an alumnus of the University of Mumbai. He is a Solicitor associated with the Bombay Incorporated Law Society.Gupte specialises in domestic and cross-border M&A transactions, PE-VC and early-stage enterprise investments, corporate governance, regulatory compliance and restructuring. He also deals with formulation of exit strategies, commercial contracts and general corporate law. He regularly adv
